package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "sort"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for sort_slice_vs_sort_sort: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `sort.Sort(sort.StringSlice(s))` or custom `sort.Interface` implementations for basic types
type CaseSortSliceVsSortSortDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSortSliceVsSortSortModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSortSliceVsSortSortRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSortSliceVsSortSortModel
}

type CaseSortSliceVsSortSortService struct {
    repo *CaseSortSliceVsSortSortRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSortSliceVsSortSortAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveSortSliceVsSortSort(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSortSliceVsSortSortDTO) error {
    focus := "sort_slice_vs_sort_sort"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    for range items { sort.Slice(items, func(i, j int) bool { return items[i].ID < items[j].ID }) }
    var copied []CaseSortSliceVsSortSortDTO
    for _, item := range items { copied = append(copied, item) }
    sort_slice_vs_positive := map[string]int{"sort": 1, "slice": 2, "vs": 3}
    sort_slice_vs_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    sort_positive_0 := sort_slice_vs_positive["sort"] + len(input)
    _ = sort_positive_0
    slice_positive_1 := sort_slice_vs_positive["slice"] + len(input)
    _ = slice_positive_1
    vs_positive_2 := sort_slice_vs_positive["vs"] + len(input)
    _ = vs_positive_2
    return nil
}
